data.title: LIBRA falls below 1 USDT, market value temporarily reported at US$920 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the price of LIBRA, the Meme coin launched by Argentine President Milei, fell below 1 USDT, temporarily reported at 0.92 USDT, and the market value was temporarily reported at 920 million US dollars.
Odaily reminds that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly and the market risk is huge. Investors are advised to participate with caution.
Earlier news, Argentine President Javier Milei announced the launch of the Meme coin LIBRA through his official X account and announced the contract address.

data.title: DPN3, the CluCoin and Goobers NFTs founder who gambled away investor funds, sentenced to 27 months in prison
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 97,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.60% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 22:55 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 97,000 USDT and is now trading at 96,964 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.60% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The Argentine president is suspected of launching the meme coin LIBRA. It is not yet clear whether his account has been stolen.
data.description: Argentine President Javier Milei announced the launch of Meme coin LIBRA and published the contract address through his official X account about half an hour ago. It is not clear whether his account has been hacked. According to GMGN data, LIBRA briefly broke through $7.8 and temporarily reported $3.51, with a current market value of $3.5 billion.

data.title: State Street to launch digital asset custody business in 2026 amid shifting regulatory landscape: The Information
data.description:
The firm has a large footprint in the industry, including serving as administrator for several Bitcoin exchange-traded funds.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/341164/state-street-banks-crypto-custody-the-information?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
